Skill.Name: Life Ward Potion
Skill.ToolTip: Regenerates health and prevents being disabled

Skill.Name: Concentration Potion
Skill.ToolTip: Increase target character's chance to make a Critical Hit

Skill.Name: Team Talent Poultice
Skill.ToolTip: Boosts Defense and Agility for all allies

Skill.Name: Team Battle Poultice
Skill.ToolTip: Boosts Attack and Luck for all allies

Skill.Name: Cleansing Kit
Skill.ToolTip: Removes bad effects from all allies

Skill.Name: Time Bomb
Skill.ToolTip: Delayed fire attack that deals damage and removes mana from several targets.

Skill.Name: Grease Bomb
Skill.ToolTip: Reduces agility and fire defense. Targets all enemies.

Skill.Name: Dispel Bomb
Skill.ToolTip: Dispels beneficial effects from target and adjacent allies

Skill.Name: Team Aid Kit
Skill.ToolTip: Restores hearts and mana to all allies

Skill.Name: Invulnerability Kit
Skill.ToolTip: +80% damage resistance to all allies for 6 turns

Skill.Name: Dragon Kit
Skill.ToolTip: Summons a High Dragon to make a breath attack

Skill.Name: Swarm Bottle
Skill.ToolTip: Summons a swarm of thaig spiders
